REPLY BRIEF IN SUPP OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 17, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 28, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE DEMURRER MAY BE OVERRULED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 (HOUSING COURT) ON MAY 17, 2013. DEPARTMENT 501 HEARS LANDLORD/TENANT MATTERS. SEE LOCAL RULE 8.10. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Carlos Jato of Law Offices of Daniel Burko (415-771-6174)appear for plaintiff Clemencia Paclibar opposing party.
Atty. Brian R. McClellan of Law Offices of Brian R. McClellan (510-457-9922) appear for defendant Crescent Manor Partners, L. P. moving party.

Discussion, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Third and fourth causes of action allege sufficient facts. Deny motion to strike. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Peter J Busch, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To May-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is transferred to be heard in Department 501 (Housing Court) on May 17, 2013. Department 501 hears landlord/tenant matters. See Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to April 17, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 28, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer may be overruled. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
